svg.title: SlimZero architecture diagram
svg.desc: Three-zone structural diagram showing local pipeline, API call, and post-processing zones of SlimZero

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Intent Extractor stage in SlimZero')
sendPrompt('Explain the Prompt Rewriter stage in SlimZero')
sendPrompt('Explain the Semantic Guard in SlimZero — why cant it be disabled?')
sendPrompt('What does the Few-Shot Ranker do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Response Format Injector and Hallucination Risk Scorer do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Token Budget Enforcer do?')

g.text: ONE call · tokens spent here only

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Response Validator do in SlimZero?')
sendPrompt('How does the Hallucination Flag work in SlimZero?')
sendPrompt('What does the Savings Logger track?')
sendPrompt('How does the GSD task graph work in SlimZero?')
sendPrompt('How does the Ralph agent loop integrate with SlimZero circuit breakers?')

g.text: teal = local (0 tokens) · coral = only token cost · purple = post-processing (0 tokens) · amber = non-bypassable
